title: Your Multivitamin Claims Need a Safety Net
subject: One risky claim on your multivitamin label could trigger an FDA letter
body:

I was reviewing how fast-growing supplement brands launch new SKUs, and one pattern keeps showing up: the marketing copy moves faster than compliance review. For a daily multivitamin, that gap is dangerous. Phrases like "complete immunity shield," "clinically proven energy," or "doctor-recommended formula" sound persuasive — until a regulator or marketplace reviewer flags them.

ClaimGuard (claimguard.in) is built exactly for this moment. Paste your website copy, Amazon listing, or label text and our engine scans every claim against FDA, FTC, and FSSAI rules. A live regulation feed keeps your team ahead of policy shifts, and the task board turns each flagged claim into a trackable fix — from Needs Review to Approved.

You do not need a legal team on retainer to catch problems early. You need a system that reviews copy before it goes live.

Start free today and scan your multivitamin listing in minutes: https://claimguard.in/signup
